title: Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife reserve established in 2018 in Nagbhir, in the Chandrapur district of the Vidarbha region in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife reserve established in 2018 in Nagbhir, in the Chandrapur district of the Vidarbha region in Maharashtra, India. It includes 159 km2 (61 mi2) of southern tropical dry forest and a lake. The forest is considered a key region on the connecting corridor for the tiger migration between the Tadoba Andhari Tiger Project and the Umred Karhandala Wildlife Sanctuary. It is named after a village of the same name, which is almost in the middle of the forest, about 2 km from the dam and the resort.

topPlaces.name: Ghodazari Dam
topPlaces.description: Ghodazari Dam (Marathi: घोडाझरी धरण) is an earthfill dam on Gorazari river near Nagbhid in Chandrapur district of the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Nagbhid
topPlaces.description: Nagbhid, also known as Nagbhir, is a town and a municipal council in the Chandrapur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (87 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ghodazari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ghodazari Dam, Nagbhid.
